channel.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Feb 28th, 2022
item.description:
Online resources

  • Security related Operating Systems @ Rawsec - Complete list of security related operating systems

    • ETC

  • Rawsec's CyberSecurity Inventory - An open-source inventory of tools, resources, CTF platforms and Operating Systems about CyberSecurity. (Source)

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 20th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

  • Decompiler.com - Java, Android, Python, C# online decompiler.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 9th, 2021
item.description:
Web

  • TryHackMe - Hands-on cyber security training through real-world scenarios.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Sep 15th, 2021
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Roppers Computing Fundamentals
    • Free, self-paced curriculum that builds a base of knowledge in computers and networking. Intended to build up a student with no prior technical knowledge to be confident in their ability to learn anything and continue their security education. Full text available as a gitbook.

    • General

  • Roppers CTF Fundamentals Course - Free course designed to get a student crushing CTFs as quickly as possible. Teaches the mentality and skills required for crypto, forensics, and more. Full text available as a gitbook.

    • ETC

  • Roppers Security Fundamentals - Free course that teaches a beginner how security works in the real world. Learn security theory and execute defensive measures so that you are better prepared against threats online and in the physical world. Full text available as a gitbook.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking May 27th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

  • Netzstars337 - Discover internet-wide misconfigurations, using zgrab2 and others.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Feb 16th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

  • RustScanstars7.3k - Extremely fast port scanner built with Rust, designed to scan all ports in a couple of seconds and utilizes nmap to perform port enumeration in a fraction of the time.
  • CSP Scanner - Analyze a site's Content-Security-Policy (CSP) to find bypasses and missing directives.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Nov 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Lena151: Reversing With Lena

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Nov 2nd, 2020
item.description:

Docker Images for Penetration Testing & Security

  • `docker pull metasploitframework/metasploit-framework

  • Exploit Writing Tutorials for Pentesters

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Tools

Disassemblers and debuggers

  • Ghidra - A software reverse engineering (SRE) suite of tools developed by NSA's Research Directorate in support of the Cybersecurity mission

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • Git-Scannerstars272 - A tool for bug hunting or pentesting for targeting websites that have open .git repositories available in public

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Sep 30th, 2020
item.description:
Competition

  • prompt(1) to win - XSS Challenges

    • Tools

    Other

  • Kaitai Structstars3.2k - a DSL for creating parsers in a variety of programming languages. The Web IDE is particularly useful for reverse-engineering.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Aug 26th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • PhpSploitstars1.8k - Full-featured C2 framework which silently persists on webserver via evil PHP oneliner

Tools

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Apr 8th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

  • Scapystars80 - A Python tool and library for low level packet creation and manipulation

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Nov 14th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • Spyse - Data gathering service that collects web info using OSINT. Provided info: IPv4 hosts, domains/whois, ports/banners/protocols, technologies, OS, AS, maintains huge SSL/TLS DB, and more... All the data is stored in its own database allowing get the data without scanning.
  • Findsubdomains - A subdomains discovery tool that collects all possible subdomains from open source internet and validates them through various tools to provide accurate results.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 15th, 2019
item.description:
Competition

  • HackTheBox

    • tools

  • ebowlastars695 - Framework for Making Environmental Keyed Payloads

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 11th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • IPED - Indexador e Processador de Evidências Digitais - Brazilian Federal Police Tool for Forensic Investigation

item.description:
System

  • HackingLab

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 4th, 2019
item.description:
Web

  • fuzzy.land - Website by an Austrian group. Lots of challenges taken from CTFs they participated in.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Sep 5th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

  • findsubdomains - really fast subdomains scanning service that has much greater opportunities than simple subs finder(works using OSINT).
  • cirt-fuzzer - A simple TCP/UDP protocol fuzzer.
  • ASlookup - a useful tool for exploring autonomous systems and all related info (CIDR, ASN, Org...)

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Aug 9th, 2019
item.description:
tools

  • PowerSploitstars10k - A PowerShell post exploitation framework

  • Synalize It/Hexinator -

    • Competition

  • Pico CTF

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Mar 8th, 2019
item.description:
General

  • Strong node.jsstars472 - An exhaustive checklist to assist in the source code security analysis of a node.js web service.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Nov 13th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • badtouchstars333 - Scriptable network authentication cracker
  • sniffgluestars891 - Secure multithreaded packet sniffer

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 29th, 2018
item.description:
Bug bounty - Earn Some Money

  • Bugcrowd
  • Hackerone

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 20th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Disassemblers and debuggers

  • x64dbgstars39.2k - An open-source x64/x32 debugger for Windows
  • Capstonestars5.9k

    • Tools

    Decompilers

  • JVM-based languages
  • Krakataustars1.6k - the best decompiler I have used. Is able to decompile apps written in Scala and Kotlin into Java code. JD-GUI and Luyten have failed to do it fully.
  • procyon
    • Luytenstars4.5k - one of the best, though a bit slow, hangs on some binaries and not very well maintained.
  • JAD - JAD Java Decompiler (closed-source, unmaintained)
  • JADXstars31.9k - a decompiler for Android apps. Not related to JAD.
  • .net-based languages
    • dotPeek - a free-of-charge .NET decompiler from JetBrains
    • ILSpystars16.1k - an open-source .NET assembly browser and decompiler
    • dnSpystars21.9k - .NET assembly editor, decompiler, and debugger
  • native code
    • Hopper - A OS X and Linux Disassembler/Decompiler for 32/64-bit Windows/Mac/Linux/iOS executables.
    • cutterstars12.1k - a decompiler based on radare2.
    • retdecstars6.8k
    • snowmanstars2.2k
    • Hex-Rays

    • Tools

    Deobfuscators

  • de4dotstars6k - .NET deobfuscator and unpacker.
  • JS Beautifierstars7.9k
  • JS Nice - a web service guessing JS variables names and types based on the model derived from open source.

    • Tools

    Other

  • nudge4jstars150 - Java tool to let the browser talk to the JVM
  • dex2jarstars10.3k - Tools to work with Android .dex and Java .class files
  • androguard - Reverse engineering, malware and goodware analysis of Android applications
  • antinetstars271 - .NET anti-managed debugger and anti-profiler code
  • UPX - the Ultimate Packer (and unpacker) for eXecutables

    • Tools

    Execution logging and tracing

  • Wireshark - A free and open-source packet analyzer
  • tcpdump - A powerful command-line packet analyzer; and libpcap, a portable C/C++ library for network traffic capture
  • mitmproxystars28.9k - An interactive, SSL-capable man-in-the-middle proxy for HTTP with a console interface
  • Charles Proxy - A cross-platform GUI web debugging proxy to view intercepted HTTP and HTTPS/SSL live traffic
  • usbmon - USB capture for Linux.
  • USBPcapstars700 - USB capture for Windows.
  • dynStructstars294 - structures recovery via dynamic instrumentation.
  • drltracestars340 - shared library calls tracing.

    • Tools

    Hex editors

  • HxD - A hex editor which, additionally to raw disk editing and modifying of main memory (RAM), handles files of any size
  • WinHex - A hexadecimal editor, helpful in the realm of computer forensics, data recovery, low-level data processing, and IT security
  • wxHexEditorstars459

    • Tools

    Other

  • Binwalkstars8.6k - Detects signatures, unpacks archives, visualizes entropy.
  • Velesstars863 - a visualizer for statistical properties of blobs.
  • Protobuf inspectorstars726
  • DarunGrimstars354 - executable differ.
  • DBeaverstars28.7k - a DB editor.
  • Dependenciesstars5.5k - a FOSS replacement to Dependency Walker.
  • PEview - A quick and easy way to view the structure and content of 32-bit Portable Executable (PE) and Component Object File Format (COFF) files
  • BinText - A small, very fast and powerful text extractor that will be of particular interest to programmers.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 9th, 2018
item.description:
tools

  • empirestars6.7k - A post exploitation framework for powershell and python.
  • silenttrinitystars1.9k - A post exploitation tool that uses iron python to get past powershell restrictions.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Aug 30th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • Nipestars1.5k - A script to make Tor Network your default gateway.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jul 26th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • Amassstars7.9k - In-depth subdomain enumeration tool that performs scraping, recursive brute forcing, crawling of web archives, name altering and reverse DNS sweeping

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jun 25th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • NoSQLMapstars2.2k - Automated NoSQL database enumeration and web application exploitation tool.
  • VHostScanstars981 - A virtual host scanner that performs reverse lookups, can be used with pivot tools, detect catch-all scenarios, aliases and dynamic default pages.
  • SubFinderstars6.3k - SubFinder is a subdomain discovery tool that discovers valid subdomains for any target using passive online sources.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jun 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Competition

  • ZeroDays CTF
  • Insomni’hack

item.description:
Tools

  • ssh-mitmstars1.5k - An SSH/SFTP man-in-the-middle tool that logs interactive sessions and passwords.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking May 11th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

  • Autopsy - A digital forensics platform and graphical interface to The Sleuth Kit and other digital forensics tools

    • Bug bounty

  • Awesome bug bounty resources by EdOverflowstars4.5k

  • Movies For Hackersstars9.3k - A curated list of movies every hacker & cyberpunk must watch.

  • Wifi Jammer - Free program to jam all wifi clients in range

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Mar 27th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

  • Paros - A Java-based HTTP/HTTPS proxy for assessing web application vulnerability
  • mitmsocks4jstars28 - Man-in-the-middle SOCKS Proxy for Java
  • sleuthkitstars2.1k - A library and collection of command-line digital forensics tools
  • EnCase - The shared technology within a suite of digital investigations products by Guidance Software

    • Cryptography

    Tools

  • xortoolstars1.2k - A tool to analyze multi-byte XOR cipher

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Mar 5th, 2017
item.description:
General

  • Pentest Cheat Sheetsstars3k - Collection of cheat sheets useful for pentesting

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Feb 15th, 2017
item.description:
Online resources

  • Security @ Distrowatch - Website dedicated to talking about, reviewing and keeping up to date with open source operating systems
  • Best Linux Penetration Testing Distributions @ CyberPunk - Description of main penetration testing distributions

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Feb 4th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

Disassemblers and debuggers

  • ScratchABitstars380 - Easily retargetable and hackable interactive disassembler with IDAPython-compatible plugin API

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jan 2nd, 2017
item.description:
Tools

Docker Images for Penetration Testing & Security

  • docker pull kalilinux/kali-linux-docker official Kali Linux
  • docker pull owasp/zap2docker-stable - official OWASP ZAPstars10k
  • docker pull wpscanteam/wpscan - official WPScan

item.description:

  • Rookit Arsenal - OS RE and rootkit development

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Jul 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Tools

Disassemblers and debuggers

  • plasma - Interactive disassembler for x86/ARM/MIPS. Generates indented pseudo-code with colored syntax code.

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking May 14th, 2016
item.description:
Reverse Engineering

  • Crackmes.de - The world first and largest community website for crackmes and reversemes.

item.description:

  • pigstars426 - A Linux packet crafting tool

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Nov 14th, 2015
item.description:
General

  • Exploit database - An ultimate archive of exploits and vulnerable software
  • CTF archives (shell-storm)

    • Tools

  • nmap - Nmap (Network Mapper) is a security scanner

    • Web

  • 0xf.at - a website without logins or ads where you can solve password-riddles (so called hackits).

    • Competition

  • PHD CTF

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Oct 11th, 2015
item.description:
Tools

Disassemblers and debuggers

  • radare2 - A portable reversing framework

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Dec 17th, 2014
item.description:
Cryptography

Tools

  • Aircrack - Aircrack is 802.11 WEP and WPA-PSK keys cracking program.
  • John the Ripper - A fast password cracker

    • Tools

  • sqlmapstars24.9k - Automatic SQL injection and database takeover tool
  • Aircrack-ng - An 802.11 WEP and WPA-PSK keys cracking program
  • Metasploitstars28.4k A computer security project that provides information about security vulnerabilities and aids in penetration testing and IDS signature development.
  • mimikatzstars16.1k - A little tool to play with Windows security
  • malzilla - Malware hunting tool

    • ETC

  • SecTools - Top 125 Network Security Tools

    • General

  • Open Malware
  • CTFtime.org - All about CTF (Capture The Flag)
  • WeChall

    • Competition

  • RuCTFe
  • Ghost in the Shellcode
  • SECUINSIDE CTF
  • Codegate CTF
  • Boston Key Party CTF
  • hack.lu CTF
  • Pliad CTF

    • Tutorials

  • Corelan Team's Exploit writing tutorial
  • Malware Analysis Tutorials: a Reverse Engineering Approach

    • Tools

    Disassemblers and debuggers

  • IDA - IDA is a Windows, Linux or Mac OS X hosted multi-processor disassembler and debugger
  • OllyDbg - A 32-bit assembler level analysing debugger for Windows

    • System

  • Exploit Exercises - Nebula

    • Reverse Engineering

  • simples.kr - (Korean)

item.title: carpedm20/awesome-hacking Dec 16th, 2014
item.description:
Tools

  • tools.web-max.ca - base64 base85 md4,5 hash, sha1 hash encoding/decoding
  • NetworkMiner - A Network Forensic Analysis Tool (NFAT)
  • ZAP - The Zed Attack Proxy (ZAP) is an easy to use integrated penetration testing tool for finding vulnerabilities in web applications

    • System

  • OverTheWire - Semtex
  • OverTheWire - Vortex
  • OverTheWire - Drifter
  • pwnable.kr - Provide various pwn challenges regarding system security
  • SmashTheStack

    • Reverse Engineering

  • Reversing.kr - This site tests your ability to Cracking & Reverse Code Engineering
  • CodeEngn - (Korean)

    • Cryptography

  • OverTheWire - Krypton

    • Web

  • Hack This Site! - a free, safe and legal training ground for hackers to test and expand their hacking skills
  • Webhacking.kr

    • Competition

  • DEF CON
  • CSAW CTF
